title: veronica rubrifolia subsp. rubrifolia
intro: Veronica rubrifolia subsp. rubrifolia, also known as the red-leaved speedwell, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the plantain family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Veronica rubrifolia subsp. rubrifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
